title: Libraries Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the libraries family — document library declarations, content types, retention, taxonomy linkage, and folder seed structures. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §10.
